name: CHK-802-1
description:
The 3000A 52T Tie Breaker Serial# 64253440010089

is have some mechanical issues with the Kirk Key and the Mechanical Interlock Mech.

The Kirk Key will bind up when trying to “CLOSE” the breaker and when it finally turns it spins freely like the mech inside isn’t turning.

You have to wiggle the key and move interlock around and the key with click and move with no resistance like its not turning the cylinder.

So not sure if it’s the Kirk Key or the Interlock that needs some TLC.
comment: Re-assigning to Dyna to confirm fix.
